name: ren-os
description: RenOS — a governable second-brain OS for Claude Code. Solo-first, fully local: a compounding wiki you own as your single source of truth + thin glue over native primitives.

plugins.name: ren
plugins.description: A governable second-brain OS for Claude Code: a compounding wiki (your single source of truth) + thin glue over native primitives (Routines, Memory, Agents). See README.md for the full feature surface.
